title: Chapter 13
content:
Chapter 13: Goddamn Mike!

Liam knew there was nothing that could be done regarding how he navigated these things, it was similar to any tangible relationship to begin with.

Except he had the advantage of a system to tell him when these women were feeling neglected which helped him drastically.

Liam already knew he couldn’t neglect them but it had truly slipped his mind, it wasn’t like he had the perfect memory or anything.

And Rachel did give him an experience he would cherish and more so, it came with financial benefits.

It was very similar to having a sugar mommy in a sense but Liam knew it was best to remain focused.

He rested on the bed and the moment his body hit the ground, his entire body went numb, the ache from the gym hit him like a wave.

Liam’s entire body went numb, he couldn’t even move his arms and this was when he realized that Mike truly wanted to kill him because there was no reason for his first time to be this intense.

"Fuck! Am I paralyzed!?" Liam thought to himself, he couldn’t believe the pain he was experiencing right now. It was excruciating.

He wanted to call Rachel to come and take care of him, she was a lonely woman with motherly instincts, she would love to feel useful to him to this capacity.

But it was tricky because it could show vulnerability he wasn’t ready for her to know but his body couldn’t move at any capacity regardless, even reaching for his phone took a considerable amount of strength.

Liam opened his phone and noticed that Rachel had sent him a picture, it was a picture of her cooking with the caption: I can’t wait for you to have a taste!

It was cute and innocent, Liam knew if this was Sara when he had money, she would be here giving him the best blowjob known to man but this was a turn of pace.

Liam decided to give it a go, if things ended with Rachel right now, he wouldn’t necessarily mind as she had always been a low level investment.

[[Liam: Hey beautiful... would you mind coming over for a second? I’m not feeling quite well.]]

Liam put down his phone, he saw the last time she had been online was over an hour but she responded right away.

[[Rachel: Omg! Are you okay!? I’m heading there right away!]]

This was all she typed, Liam dropped his phone on the bed, he cursed under his breath.

"Mike... I will sue you for an attempted murder!" Liam muttered under his breath but of course, this held no weight as he was simply thinking out loud.

-

It took a little over forty-five minutes for her to arrive, she could tell by Liam’s message that there was something truly wrong with him and this wasn’t an attempt to get her into bed.

Even though she didn’t necessarily mind this as it felt nice to be needed.

Rachel knocked but luckily, Liam had failed to lock the door before his eventual muscle cramp.

Rachel opened the door and noticed the apartment was quiet, there wasn’t a single sound coming from it.

"Liam...?" Rachel called out but there was no answer which made her panic.

"LIAM!" She screamed and heard a weak whimper in the room, Rachel didn’t think twice before rushing to the room.

She saw him sprawled on the bed awkwardly but before she could take a step further, Liam began to convulse aggressively on the bed like he was having a seizure.

"Liam! No! Please!" Rachel panicked but Liam chuckled faintly, his body ached like crazy but he wanted to mess around a little regardless.

"I-I’m just messing with you," Liam confessed as his body went still on the bed.

"You aren’t sick!? That isn’t funny," Rachel said but Liam shook his head, barely.

"I went to the gym to workout and now, my entire body is fucked," Liam confessed.

"That happens, it means you worked extra hard today... Tell me where it hurts," Rachel said as she sat beside him on the bed.

"Everywhere..." Liam confessed, Liam was glad he had freshened up before this happened or he would have been covered in sweat.

"D-Do you want me to massage you?" Rachel asked and there was no way in hell Liam was going to turn this down.

"Yes please!"

[Ding!]

[Emotional Investment Alert!]

[Target: Rachel Kim (Low-Value MILF)]

[Status: Improving Emotional Connection]

[Emotional Meter: Excellent 76%→93%!]
